title: pleione occultata
intro: Pleione occultata, also known as the Chinese orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of China. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Pleione occultata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
